Interface Lot

All Known Implementing Classes:
Tile, TileAnimalPair
public sealed interface Lot permits Tile, TileAnimalPair
Represents a general lot in the Cascadia game, which can either be a Tile or a TileAnimalPair.

The Lot interface provides methods to check the type of the lot, convert it to its specific type, and check its compatibility with animals and habitats.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type

    Determines if the provided Lot is an "ideal tile" in the Cascadia game.

    Checks if the lot is a Tile.

  • Method Details

    • toString

      String toString()
      Returns a string representation of the lot.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a string describing the lot

    • isTile

      boolean isTile()
      Checks if the lot is a Tile.
      Returns:
      true if the lot is a Tile, false otherwise

    • isTileAnimalPair

      boolean isTileAnimalPair()
      Checks if the lot is a TileAnimalPair.
      Returns:
      true if the lot is a TileAnimalPair, false otherwise

    • asTile

      Tile asTile()
      Converts the lot to a Tile.
      Returns:
      the lot as a Tile
      Throws:
      ClassCastException - if the lot is not a Tile

    • asTileAnimalPair

      TileAnimalPair asTileAnimalPair()
      Converts the lot to a TileAnimalPair.
      Returns:
      the lot as a TileAnimalPair
      Throws:
      ClassCastException - if the lot is not a TileAnimalPair

    • canAcceptAnimal

      boolean canAcceptAnimal(Animal animal)
      Checks if the lot can accept the specified animal.
      Parameters:
      animal - the Animal to check compatibility with
      Returns:
      true if the lot can accept the animal, false otherwise

    • hasHabitat

      boolean hasHabitat(ImageLoader imageLoader, Habitat habitat)
      Checks if the lot has the specified habitat.
      Parameters:
      habitat - the Habitat to check compatibility with
      Returns:
      true if the lot has the habitat, false otherwise

    • isIdealTile

      static boolean isIdealTile(Lot lot)
      Determines if the provided Lot is an "ideal tile" in the Cascadia game.

      An ideal tile is defined as:

      • A Tile with exactly one habitat and one animal.
      • A TileAnimalPair whose associated Tile has exactly one habitat and one animal.
      Parameters:
      lot - the Lot to check, which can be either a Tile or a TileAnimalPair
      Returns:
      true if the provided Lot is an ideal tile; false otherwise
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if lot is null
